\subsection*{Book I Boundary (Non-Claims)}
\noindent Book I proves the items above and nothing more. The following belong to later books and may not be imported from Book I:
\begin{itemize}
\item Local stability of observable outcomes — belongs to Books II/III
\item Boundary determinacy — belongs to Books II/IV
\item Source universality — belongs to Book III
\item Branch legitimacy — belongs to Book V
\item Continuum correspondence — belongs to Book VI
\end{itemize}
